subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all mention and utterance, befitteth the Most Holy and Most Exalted Court of the Lord of all beings, Who through His Word hath created the world [3.5s]... ...Thou hast inquired about the tradition “Knowledge is twenty and seven letters. All that the Prophets have revealed are two letters thereof
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان بساط امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودیرا سزاست که عالم را بکلمه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @thankfulness; gratitude, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @realms of being; three realms; five realms
